productName: Trees Co & High Tide Hash Hole 1g - Grape Gas & Maple Barz (H) DOH
description: A indica infused joint built on Grape Gas and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of grape, diesel, and chemical, with a heavy, relaxed body calm. A little goes a long way.
